semantic_blueprint.root_cause_hypothesis: The vulnerability arises from allowing the addition of sub-columns to a parent column that has an OBJECT(IGNORED) column policy, which can lead to inconsistent or unintended schema states.
semantic_blueprint.fix_logic: The patch introduces a check during the addColumn operation to detect if any new column being added is a sub-column of a parent column with an OBJECT(IGNORED) policy. If such a case is detected, it sets a subject flag to prevent or specially handle this scenario.
semantic_blueprint.patch_intent_summary: Prevent adding sub-columns to parent columns with OBJECT(IGNORED) policy during table alteration to maintain schema integrity.

hunk_chain.connects_to_next: Prepares next hunk in same file with related context.
